title: Add a direct message feature
excerpt: Company wants to use Monday as our soul source of interoffice communication.  However, I cannot find a direct messaging portion of this site.  Everything else has been very useful but there is some stuff that I would rat…

posts.author: ScottKincaid (Scott Kincaid)
posts.cookedHtml: Company wants to use Monday as our soul source of interoffice communication. However, I cannot find a direct messaging portion of this site. Everything else has been very useful but there is some stuff that I would rather go direct to another employee about. Is that something that could be incorporated?
